title: hoya latifolia
intro: Hoya latifolia, also known as the 'Wide Leafed Hoya', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hoya latifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Hoya latifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies such as teas and topical applications.
